_comment: Non-secret registry of systems the platform touches. NEVER put passwords, tokens, or keys in this file. Record only: what the system is, who owns it, and WHERE the secret lives (env var name, password-manager vault item, etc.). Update status as logins arrive.

statusLegend.needed: We expect a login/key but do not have it yet
statusLegend.received: Credential received and filed into its secret location
statusLegend.active: Wired into the platform and working

systems.name: Eventeny
systems.notes: Current system of record for ticketing + vendor/sponsor applications. Need admin login + API access if available.

systems.name: Stripe
systems.notes: Owned ticket checkout + Apple Pay. Keys go in .env, never in git.

systems.name: QuickBooks Online
systems.notes: OAuth app + realm ID. See docs/quickbooks-integration.md.

systems.name: Domain / DNS (texassandfest.org)
systems.notes: Registrar + DNS login. Needed for email auth (SPF/DKIM), subdomains, and site cutover.

systems.name: Website host / CMS (current texassandfest.org)
systems.notes: Current site appears Wix-hosted (media asset URLs are wixstatic). Need admin to plan overhaul/migration.

systems.name: Email marketing (Mailchimp/Klaviyo/Constant Contact — TBD)
systems.notes: Provider to be confirmed by research. Need existing list export + API key.

systems.name: SMS gateway (Twilio — proposed)
systems.notes: For ticket confirmations, event reminders, and public alerts. Requires opt-in/consent handling + A2P 10DLC registration.

systems.name: Social media (Instagram/Facebook/TikTok/X)
systems.notes: Account logins + business/Meta assets for ads.

systems.name: Web analytics (GA4 / Plausible — TBD)
systems.notes: Measurement ID + admin access for the overhauled site.

systems.name: Map platform (Mapbox/MapLibre/Proxi — proposed)
systems.notes: For sculptor/POI interactive map on web + iOS. Provider pending research.

systems.name: On-site connectivity (Starlink / managed WiFi — proposed)
systems.notes: Private LAN for ~100 users + POS/RFID. Pending research; may be a rental account.

systems.name: RFID / cashless provider (TBD)
systems.notes: Only if RFID/cashless is adopted. Pending research + go/no-go decision.

systems.name: Google Workspace / shared email + drive
systems.notes: Org email + document sharing for incoming docs.

systems.name: Two-way radio / PoC comms (current: radio)
systems.notes: Currently VHF/UHF radios on-site. Evaluating push-to-talk-over-cellular augmentation.
